title: Brandads 6 AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Aspect ratio 1:1. Luxury fashion editorial, three-panel composite layout on cool-grey studio background. CENTER PANEL (3-FRAME COLLAGE + ULTRA-THIN BORDERS) Single vertical panel split into exactly 3 stacked frames (top/middle/bottom) with ultra-thin silver/white divider lines. Same character in all frames (identity consistent), wearing all-black outfit: blazer, shirt, slim trousers. Top: close-up portrait, sharp eye contact, soft luxury lighting Middle: half-body confident standing pose, blazer visible Bottom: dynamic stylish pose, different angle and hand placement Clean Vogue-style editorial collage, premium spacing, soft studio lighting, high realism. LEFT PANEL (BLAZER POWER POSE) Full-body cinematic shot. All-black blazer suit. Power stance, one hand in pocket, other adjusting lapel. Low-angle, strong runway energy. Confident luxury campaign expression, rim light + soft haze. RIGHT PANEL (SHIRT & PANT STYLISH POSE) Full-body cinematic shot. All-black shirt + slim trousers. Modern influencer pose — walking or leaning, 3/4 angle, one hand in pocket. Calm confident expression, soft studio lighting, premium fashion tone. STYLE Ultra-realistic luxury fashion editorial, Vogue-level finish, cinematic lighting, clean composition, modern black executive aesthetic. character name: Astra Vale. fictional world: minimal high-fashion campaign mood. color palette: pearl white, graphite, mist blue, and silver controls the palette, accents, background, and supporting visual elements.
